About Us

CHENNAI · HYDERABAD · BENGALURU
"Exceptional spaces don't just happen — they're created through vision, precision, and purpose."

At Spacioworks, we believe every project is a reflection of our commitment to quality, functionality, and timeless aesthetics — the true essence of design, function, and perfection.

Founded with a vision to redefine interior execution standards in India, Spacioworks has become a trusted partner for clients who seek excellence without compromise. Our expertise spans commercial, residential, and retail environments, where we transform design concepts into reality with technical mastery and meticulous attention to detail.

In a short span, we've successfully delivered 150+ turnkey B2B2C projects and 25+ bespoke B2C spaces, collaborating with some of India's most reputed architects, designers, and brands. Each project stands as proof of our ability to deliver on time, on budget, and beyond expectation.

What truly sets us apart is our integrated approach — combining design intelligence, engineering precision, and efficient project management. From precision-fit joinery and modular fabrication to on-site coordination and material optimization, every stage is handled with care, accountability, and craftsmanship.

With innovation at our core, we leverage tools such as 3D visualization, AI-based project tracking, and digital quality audits to ensure transparency and precision at every milestone. Our clients enjoy complete visibility — from the first sketch to the final handover.

At Spacioworks, every project is personal. We take pride in turning blueprints into experiences, where craftsmanship meets innovation — and every detail reflects integrity and excellence.

Spacioworks. Design. Function. Perfection.

Key Clauses
  1. All payments must be made in favor of Spacioworks Interio Private Limited through approved banking channels only.
  2. Quotations remain valid for 7 days from the date of issue unless extended in writing.
  3. Prices may vary by 5–10% in case of design changes, measurement differences, or vendor revisions.
  4. Work will not proceed to the next stage until the corresponding milestone payment is received.
  5. Spacioworks reserves the right to revise or suspend ongoing work if payments are delayed.
  6. The booking advance becomes non-refundable once design development has commenced.
  7. If cancellation occurs after design finalization, the Client is liable for completed design work, administrative expenses, and any materials already ordered or fabricated.

Delivery & Installation

Spacioworks strives to deliver every project with care and within the planned timeline. As interior work involves multiple dependencies, timelines are indicative and not absolute commitments.

Delivery Timelines

  1. Project timelines are shared after design finalization and receipt of milestone payments.
  2. Typical modular projects are completed within 45–60 working days from site readiness.
  3. The Client acknowledges that external dependencies may affect final completion dates.

Site Readiness Requirements

  1. Civil flooring, skirting, and tile work.
  2. Final wall finishes, including putty and primer.
  3. Electrical and plumbing provisions completed as per final drawings.
  4. Clear, unhindered site access for material movement.
  5. Continuous power supply for installation activity.

Delays and Dependencies

  1. Spacioworks shall not be held responsible for delays due to non-readiness of site, third-party contractors, building restrictions, or power interruptions.
  2. Delivery timelines are automatically extended for any delay in payment, drawing approvals, or client-requested changes.
  3. Any additional work requested during or after installation will result in revised timelines and costs.

Installation Handling

  1. Installation shall be performed only by authorized Spacioworks installers.
  2. The Client must ensure on-site safety and security for stored materials.
  3. Once materials are delivered, Spacioworks is not responsible for loss or damage by third parties.
  4. After installation, the Client shall inspect and confirm acceptance in writing before project closure.

What Is Not Covered

  1. Normal wear and tear, scratches, dents, fading, or cosmetic changes
  2. Water leakage, dampness, seepage, or building-level issues
  3. Damage by misuse, mishandling, harsh chemicals, pests, or pets
  4. Alterations or repairs done by anyone other than Spacioworks
  5. Corrosion of metallic parts due to moisture or coastal air
  6. Third-party or client-supplied materials, appliances, or fittings
  7. Acts of God or site-related civil issues
Spacioworks Interio Private Limited  |  www.spacioworks.in

Care, Cleaning & Support

A. General Care

  1. Clean surfaces regularly with a soft, dry, or slightly damp cloth.
  2. Avoid strong chemicals, detergents, or abrasive cleaning pads.
  3. Wipe spills immediately; do not let moisture stand on surfaces.
  4. Avoid direct exposure to sunlight, heat, or humidity for long periods.
  5. Keep interiors well-ventilated to prevent mold and odor.

B. Cabinets, Hardware & Surfaces

  1. Do not overload shelves or drawers beyond rated capacity. Use handles or knobs; avoid pulling from edges.
  2. Close doors and drawers softly. Avoid spraying perfumes or acids near metallic parts.
  3. For stone/quartz surfaces: clean with mild soap and water. Avoid hot utensils and direct cutting.

C. Spacio Care Support

After project completion and handover, Spacioworks continues to support clients through Spacio Care.

  1. Email care@spacioworks.in with your project reference number and issue details.
  2. The service coordinator will respond within 48–72 working hours.
  3. Inspection visit scheduled within 3–5 working days. Resolution based on part availability.
  4. Services are complimentary only if covered under valid warranty. Out-of-warranty issues are chargeable.
Spacioworks Interio Private Limited  |  www.spacioworks.in

Terms & Conditions

  1. Quotations are valid for 7 days from the date of issue unless extended in writing.
  2. Rates are subject to market changes or vendor price revisions.
  3. All designs, drawings, visuals, and BOQs remain the intellectual property of Spacioworks until the project is fully paid.
  4. Work will be executed strictly as per the final signed drawings and BOQs. Any change post sign-off will lead to revised costs and extended timelines.
  5. The Client must ensure site readiness prior to installation. Spacioworks is not liable for delays due to incomplete work or third-party dependencies.
  6. Timelines are indicative and subject to vendor shortages, client-requested changes, or force majeure events.
  7. The company's total liability is limited to the amount received for the project.
  8. Once materials are delivered to site, the Client assumes responsibility for safekeeping. Any damage or theft will not be covered.
  9. After installation, a joint inspection will be conducted. Visible issues must be reported within 7 days of handover.
  10. Spacioworks reserves the right to substitute equivalent materials of equal or higher quality if unavailable.
  11. All approvals and service requests must be sent to care@spacioworks.in. Verbal instructions are not binding.
  12. Governed by the laws of India — jurisdiction: Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
  13. Proceeding with the project or making any payment constitutes full acceptance of these terms.

Customer Conduct Policy

Spacioworks upholds the highest standards of professionalism, integrity, and mutual respect. We are committed to providing a safe, fair, and dignified working environment for all our representatives, and we expect the same level of respect and courtesy from our customers.

Spacioworks follows a strict zero-tolerance policy against any form of discrimination or harassment. Customers are required to treat all representatives with dignity and respect, regardless of sex, race, religion, caste, origin, disability, marital status, gender identity, age, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.

Spacioworks reserves the right to withhold or discontinue services at its absolute discretion if the customer fails to comply with these requirements or behaves in a discourteous, disrespectful, or abusive manner.

All communication must be conducted through official email channels. For any project-related assistance, ongoing support, or post-handover concerns, contact care@spacioworks.in — the single official point of escalation for all matters.

At Spacioworks, we believe mutual respect and transparent communication are the foundation of successful collaboration.
